name: KRONOS WORLDWIDE INC
business: Kronos Worldwide Inc is a leading global producer and marketer of value-added titanium dioxide pigments (TiO2), a base industrial product used for whiteness, brightness, and opacity. The company sells its products to approximately 3,000 customers in 100 countries, with the majority of sales in Europe, North America, and the Asia Pacific region.
namedSuppliers: Rio Tinto Iron and Titanium Ltd.

exposures.sentence: Kronos Worldwide, Inc. (NYSE: KRO) (Kronos), incorporated in Delaware in 1989, is a leading global producer and marketer of value-added titanium dioxide pigments, or TiO2, a base industrial product used in a wide range of applications.
